name: Sample Clickable Part
description: A simple script that makes a part change color when clicked

blocks.label: When Game Starts
blocks.description: Initialize the part when game starts

blocks.label: Create ClickDetector
blocks.code:
local clickDetector = Instance.new("ClickDetector")
clickDetector.Parent = script.Parent
clickDetector.MouseClick:Connect(function(player)
  script.Parent.BrickColor = BrickColor.Random()
  print(player.Name .. " clicked the part!")
end)
blocks.description: Create a click detector that changes part color

MainScript.source:
-- Generated by LuaScratch
local clickDetector = Instance.new("ClickDetector")
clickDetector.Parent = script.Parent
clickDetector.MouseClick:Connect(function(player)
  script.Parent.BrickColor = BrickColor.Random()
  print(player.Name .. " clicked the part!")
end)
